_comment: Reference wiring for the AGENT-ADAPTER layer (loop hygiene git cannot see).
This example uses the Claude Code hooks schema. Any runtime that can run a
command before a tool call and honor its exit code can wire the same scripts:
exit 2 = block the pending tool call, exit 0 = allow,
The ENFORCEMENT layer (commit-msg / pre-commit / pre-push) is NOT wired here —
it is git-native; install it once with `node hooks/install.js`.
Copy the `hooks` block into .claude/settings.json (project) to activate.
